mapper.select: select ho.id, 'HOTEL' as order_type, h.hotel_name as item_name, ho.total_amount, ho.order_status, ho.check_in_date as use_date, ho.check_in_date, ho.check_out_date, null as visit_date, null as quantity, ho.create_time from hotel_order ho left join hotel h on ho.hotel_id = h.id where ho.user_id = #{userId} order by ho.create_time desc

select to1.id, 'TICKET' as order_type, t.ticket_name as item_name, to1.total_amount, to1.order_status, to1.visit_date as use_date, null as check_in_date, null as check_out_date, to1.visit_date, to1.quantity, to1.create_time from ticket_order to1 left join ticket t on to1.ticket_id = t.id where to1.user_id = #{userId} order by to1.create_time desc
